prompt: Create a vertical 3:4 photorealistic Japanese promotional flyer image with a clean editorial fashion-ad feel. Show a young Japanese woman, about 20s, wearing a plain white short-sleeve T-shirt tucked into high-waisted off-white linen pants with a tied waist belt, standing against a warm pale cream wall in soft direct sunlight. She is framed from upper thighs to head, positioned slightly right of center, looking calmly and confidently down toward the camera with a relaxed expression, natural glossy skin, subtle makeup, loose dark hair tied back with wispy strands around her face. She holds a white booklet vertically against her chest with both hands; include one thin ring on a finger. On the left side of the image, place the headline text 「理学療法士がサポート」 in an elegant Japanese Mincho-style serif font, with 「理学療法士」 in blue, 「が」 in green, and 「サポート」 in orange. The booklet cover should have a cheerful sports-school logo design with the main Japanese text 「高校生のスポーツ教室」 in playful rounded lettering, blue/orange/green colors, plus the Lovart logo text near the bottom. Count exactly 5 prominent sports-themed graphic elements on the booklet: 1 blue running silhouette on the left, 1 orange running silhouette on the right, 1 blue-and-white soccer ball near the lower left, 1 orange basketball near the lower right, and 1 circular swoosh arc wrapping around the title. Add small decorative stars and dots around the logo, but keep them secondary. Use a bright airy color palette, realistic shadows on the wall, shallow depth of field, premium commercial photography, crisp booklet print, no watermark, no extra text beyond the specified Japanese copy and Lovart branding. Customize the visible sponsor brand as Lovart, the booklet title as 高校生のスポーツ教室, the left headline as 理学療法士がサポート, the target audience as high school students, and the model outfit color as white and off-white.
